Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education and professional skills for employment in auditing, directly supporting Targets 4.3 and 4.4.
evidence: 從事財會或審計相關事業

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Auditing strengthens financial institutions (Target 8.10) and ensures market integrity, which supports economic growth. The course provides skills for decent jobs in the financial sector.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Auditing enables enterprises to access financial services (Target 9.3). The topic 'AI於審計學之應用' (Application of AI in Auditing) directly relates to technological upgrading and innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Auditing is a key component of monitoring financial markets and institutions (Target 10.5), which promotes stability and can indirectly help reduce economic inequalities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The objective to '探討新興審計之議題' (discuss emerging audit issues) could infer a link to sustainability reporting, a key part of Target 12.6, but it is not explicit.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Core to Targets 16.5 & 16.6. The course teaches '內部控制測試' (internal control tests) and issuing '查核報告' (audit reports) to reduce corruption and build accountable institutions.
